tool_input.command: bash /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/scripts/full-text-search.sh "CSV" "BeanRecord" "FlatFileDataReader" "FileRecordReader" "DataReader" "Java Bean" "ファイル読み込み" "レコード形式"

for file in component/libraries/libraries-data-bind.json component/libraries/libraries-data-format.json component/libraries/libraries-data-converter.json component/handlers/handlers-data-read-handler.json; do

done
